concerns.text: T012 (schema validation tests) appears before T009 (data models) in Phase 2. Schema tests cannot validate schemas that don't exist yet. T009 must precede T012.

Test tasks T014-T015, T024-T025, T031-T032, T041-T043 are marked [P] (parallel-safe) but depend on implementation tasks. Contract/integration tests cannot run until their target code exists. Remove [P] from test tasks or restructure to separate test-writing from test-execution.

US2 (Phase 4) and US3 (Phase 5) claim independent testability but depend on US1 outputs (T020, T023, T028). The 'independently-shippable unit' requirement is violated—US2/US3 cannot be tested without US1 completion. Document this as sequential dependency or restructure to enable true independence.
T018-T019 (logging) and T020-T022 (inference) are not explicitly ordered relative to T017 (simplify). Add explicit dependency notes: T018-T019 depend on T017; T020-T022 depend on T016-T017.
